title: University Of Wisconsin Receives $100 Million For Its New AI College
description: The University of Wisconsin–Madison has received $100 million in gift commitments for its new College of Computing and Artificial Intelligence, set to launch this July.
content:
The University of Wisconsin–Madison has received $100 million in private gift commitments for its new College of Computing and Artificial Intelligence, which is set to launch on July 1, 2026.

description: Schools in Madhya Pradesh are gearing up for Artificial Intelligence education starting 2026-27 academic session for over 4 lakh students., Education, Times Now
content:

title: Taylor Swift files trademarks for voice and image in bid to counter AI misuse

title: Andhra CM Naidu lays foundation for USD 15 billon Google data centre near Vizag
description: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu on Tuesday laid the foundation for a USD 15 billion Google Artificial Intelligence data centre near Visakhapatnam and said it will be a growth engine for India. Naidu said this project was started in September 2025 and Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate it on September 28, 2028, promising to extend cooperation from the Government of Andhra Pradesh.

title: ‘They’re supposed to be handmade’: zine creators fight to resist AI influence
description: Artists and writers argue scrappy nature of self-published booklets is incompatible with artificial intelligence
content: The self-published zine has long been central to cultural revolutions, from queer activism to Black feminism and the riot grrrl punk movement, producing titles such as Sniffin’ Glue and Sweet-Thang along the way. But now the traditionally analogue ar... [5034 chars]

title: Face photos reveal faster biological aging tied to poorer cancer survival
description: The Mass General Brigham research team behind FaceAge, an artificial intelligence (AI) tool that can estimate a person's biological age from a single photo, is reporting in a new study that estimating biological age from multiple photos taken over time can provide even more information about how well a person with cancer will do with treatment.
